parameters.query:
SELECT r.id, r.tenant_id, r.agent, r.rec_type, r.data, r.priority, r.status, r.created_at
FROM recommendations r
WHERE r.tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND r.status = 'approved'
  AND r.outcome_score IS NULL
  AND r.created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT e.id, e.lead_id, e.subject, e.thread_id, e.status,
       COALESCE(er.reply_received, false) as reply_received
FROM emails_sent e
LEFT JOIN email_replies er ON er.draft_id = e.draft_id
WHERE e.tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND e.lead_id = '$(lead_id)'
  AND e.status = 'sent'
ORDER BY e.sent_at DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT crm_id, stage, amount, status
FROM deals
WHERE tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND id = '$(deal_id)'
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE recommendations
SET outcome_score = $(outcome_score),
    outcome_note = '$(outcome_note)',
    outcome_measured_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '$(rec_id)';

meta.description: Daily at 05:00. Scores outcomes of 30-day-old recommendations. Embeds successful patterns into pgvector memory_chunks for RAG.
